The Pinboard

Every image live from the studio wall — click to zoom, drag to rearrange.
02

How a Piece Gets Made

(a)

Brief & Reference

Pin down the message, the audience, and one visual reference worth stealing from.

(b)

Rough in Canva

Block out layout, hierarchy, and copy fast where speed matters more than polish.

(c)

Finish in Photoshop

Color grade, retouch, composite, and get every edge and shadow sitting right.

(d)

AI for Assets

Generate or extend backgrounds and props with AI tools, never for final characters.

03

A Note on the Toolkit

Built with Photoshop, Canva & AI tools

Everything in this pinboard was made using Adobe Photoshop, Canva, and a set of AI image tools for backgrounds, upscaling, and quick composites — no Illustrator in the stack. If you've got source files (PSD, Canva links, or layered exports), send them over and this portfolio can pull in live previews or higher-res versions instead of the flattened images.

Want anything changed? Say the word and I can: swap in new project images, reorder or re-caption any card, adjust the palette or type, turn off the drag-to-rearrange behavior, or add a case-study page per project with process shots.

Adobe Photoshop Canva AI Image Generation AI Upscaling No Illustrator
